objective: Hand off the codex/full-autonomous-live-pilot-v1 branch with verified repo-side V1 pilot status and explicit external live-production blockers.

tasks.title: Repo-side V1 implementation surface
tasks.next_action: Review commit 04380c1 and preserve fail-closed live gates.

tasks.title: Fresh live alpha data feed
blocked_by: Stooq response in this environment is API-key/captcha content
No verified current market-data provider is configured
tasks.next_action: Configure a usable fresh market-data feed/API key, then run REQUIRE_ALPHA_CYCLE=true ./scripts/run-v1-cycle.

tasks.title: Real Toss live pilot readiness
blocked_by: Toss read-only snapshot evidence is not matched
External broker credential secret reference is not configured
Toss order/OpenAPI schemas are not verified
tasks.next_action: Verify Toss schemas and read-only responses before implementing or enabling any write adapter.

tasks.title: Documentation consolidation and draw.io architecture diagram
tasks.next_action: Update README.md and readiness docs to reflect the current V1 pilot surface; add an editable draw.io architecture artifact.

risks.description: Local historical LEAN data can be mistaken for current live alpha readiness.
risks.mitigation: Keep live alpha freshness gates strict and rerun with a fresh provider before live pilot.

risks.description: Broker write work could bypass reconciliation and emergency controls.
risks.mitigation: Require read-only reconciliation, open-order polling, cancel/flatten, schema verification, idempotency, and live preflight tests before real orders.

risks.description: Legacy docs still describe the report app as the primary product.
risks.mitigation: Consolidate README.md and execution readiness docs before handing to a human operator.

decisions.decision: Classify the branch as repo-side V1 ready but live-production partial.
decisions.reason: The local backtest, paper, dashboard, and preflight surfaces are verified, but external broker/data readiness is not.

decisions.decision: Keep live preflight fail-closed and do not fake Toss readiness.
decisions.reason: Unknown broker schema, credentials, open orders, cancel/flatten, or reconciliation state must block real-money execution.

decisions.decision: Use local LEAN data and SPY,QQQ,IWM as the default operator cycle until broader QC data exists.
decisions.reason: That universe produced strict LEAN acceptance with 0 failed data requests in the recorded local cycle.

verification.name: Implementation commit pushed
verification.evidence: git log shows 04380c1 feat(v1-pilot): add whole-system operator status

verification.name: V1 operator cycle
verification.evidence: result.md records ./scripts/run-v1-cycle completion through blocked live preflight

verification.name: LEAN backtest acceptance
verification.evidence: result.md records bt-20260524041341-2dcf61d9 passed with 0 failed data requests

verification.name: Paper execution
verification.evidence: result.md records paper order plan 2 status reconciled

verification.name: Live preflight
verification.evidence: result.md records fail-closed blocked status with Toss/live gates

verification.name: Backend automated checks
verification.evidence: result.md records bun run build, test, test:e2e, lint, and format:check

verification.name: Frontend automated checks
verification.evidence: result.md records bun run typecheck, test:run, lint, and format:check

verification.name: Real Toss order readiness
verification.evidence: result.md records missing broker credentials, Toss read-only evidence, schemas, and live/write flags

next_actions_top3: Review result.md and progress.md before changing implementation.
Configure fresh market-data feed and rerun REQUIRE_ALPHA_CYCLE=true ./scripts/run-v1-cycle.
Verify Toss read-only/schema/cancel/flatten/open-order gates before any broker write adapter work.

writer_ownership: Backend writer owns backend/src/modules/v1-pilot/** and scripts when behavior changes.
Frontend writer owns frontend/src/** dashboard/API typing files.
Docs writer owns README.md, docs/**, handoff.md, and diagram artifacts.
Verification runner owns command evidence and should avoid product-code edits unless agreed.
serialization_gates: Broker write changes merge only after read-only reconciliation, schema verification, cancel/flatten, open-order polling, idempotency, and live preflight tests exist.
README/live readiness claims merge only after matching verification evidence is recorded.
